display_information.name: MOR Finance Intelligence - Hermes
display_information.description: MOR engineering intelligence — Hermes mentor + specialist agents (recommend only)

assistant_view.assistant_description: MOR Finance engineering intelligence layer. Specialists report route quality, risk, liquidity, data health, and framework improvements — not daily revenue rollups during deployment.

suggested_prompts.title: Engineering review
suggested_prompts.message: Run engineering intelligence roundtable: mor-ops, mor-dd-risk, mor-pnl, mor-liquidity, mor-market-mode, mor-capital-ladder, mor-governance. Pull GET /api/agents/context. Synthesize route quality, risk posture, data freshness. No revenue rollup.

suggested_prompts.title: DD/Risk alert
suggested_prompts.message: Spawn mor-dd-risk: borrow/lending health, utilization, failure rate. Output APPROVE, REDUCE, or BLOCK.

suggested_prompts.title: Route quality
suggested_prompts.message: Spawn mor-pnl: route quality and opportunity scoring from /api/agents/context. PRIORITIZE/RETIRE with confidence — not daily PnL.

suggested_prompts.title: Hermes code review
suggested_prompts.message: Spawn mor-hermes: review agent framework and dataQuality flags. Suggest prompt improvements and templates. No auto-modify production.

slash_commands.description: MOR Finance intelligence (routes to main orchestrator)
MOR engineering snapshot — intelligence layer health (no revenue rollup)
All specialists — Slack thread with cross follow-ups
Engineering brief — ops, routes, risk, data quality
Ops / Health — API status and data freshness
Governance — proposals and voting posture
Full MOR review — spawn all specialists and synthesize
Route quality — opportunity scoring and route actions
Smart Router — execution-quality ranking by confidence
DD/Risk — borrow/lending health and safety alerts
Market observations — deployment tier classification
Liquidity Intelligence — pool depth and sizing
Capital Ladder — tier posture and allocation logic
Hermes — code review; MOR specialists respond
Hermes ↔ MOR full dialogue — specialists, mentor, synthesis
MOR Agents — Hermes and specialists collaborate
MOR Audit — code audit discussion by agents
MOR GitHub events channel status
MOR Suggestions — agent project improvement ideas
MOR Codefix — discuss fix and prepare PR template
